summary: Verified all 4 fixes for Ch16.ai marine services dashboard. All backend tests (20/20) passed and frontend UI correctly displays the fixes.
passed_tests: Fix 1: Manager dropdown shows exact options (Anglo-Eastern, Synergy Marine, Fleet Management Ltd, BSM Mumbai, GE Shipping, SCI India, Tolani Shipping, Essar Shipping)
Fix 1: Owner dropdown shows exact options (HPCL, Indian Oil, GE Shipping, Essar Shipping, SCI India, Reliance Industries, Adani Ports)
Fix 1: Both Sales and Ops dashboards have correct filter dropdowns
Fix 2: Job status badges display 'In Progress' (not 'in_progress')
Fix 2: formatStatusLabel utility correctly converts snake_case to Title Case
Fix 3: Bulk Carriers have only LSA/FFA services (no NAVCOM) - verified 10 vessels
Fix 3: RORO vessels have only LSA/FFA services (no NAVCOM) - verified 6 vessels
Fix 3: Tankers have FFA/LSA as expected
Fix 3: All vessels have valid services (LSA, FFA, or NAVCOM)
Fix 4: All 25 vessels have distinct Owner and Manager
Fix 4: All jobs have distinct Owner and Manager
Fix 4: Vessel cards show 'Owner | Manager' format clearly (e.g., 'Eastern Bulk Carriers AS | Fleet Management Ltd Mumbai')
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used - no new data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 fixes have been verified: (1) Static filter dropdowns working with exact company names, (2) Status labels show Title Case in UI while backend stores snake_case, (3) Vessel type to service mapping is consistent - Bulk Carriers and RORO have no NAVCOM, (4) Owner and Manager are always distinct on all vessels and jobs.
mocked_api_note: All data is MOCK-generated in backend/server.py - no external APIs used
